title: OpenNotetaker for Hinglish Meetings
abstract:
Me and my team Ostrya AI were fed up with broken meet notetakers So we decided to roll out our own.

Introducing OpenNotetaker (OSS). A small notetaker that works with hinglish and is able to extract all the useful information out of your meetings.

Some highlight features: - Works with hindi, eng
abstract_zh:
Me and my team Ostrya AI were fed up with broken meet notetakers So we decided to roll out our own.

Introducing OpenNotetaker (OSS). A small notetaker that works with hinglish and is able to extract all the useful information out of your meetings.

Some highlight features: - Works with hindi, eng
